name: tuolinagent
description: Tianjin Tuolin local knowledge base Codex plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Build and query Tuolin's local knowledge packs.
interface.longDescription: Tuolin Agent compiles local raw company materials into Graphify outputs and product-level Agent knowledge packs for Codex workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: 帮我整理或查询拓霖本地知识库。
